mapper.select: SELECT v.vote_id AS voteId, v.title, TO_CHAR(v.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(v.deadline, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS deadline, CASE WHEN v.deadline IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN v.deadline > SYSDATE THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS isClosed, vc.candidate_id AS candidateId, vc.candidate_name AS candidateName, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vote_record vr WHERE vr.candidate_id = vc.candidate_id) AS voteCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vote_record vr2 WHERE vr2.vote_id = v.vote_id) AS totalVotes, /* ★ 새로고침 후에도 내 선택 유지 — memberId 가 NULL 이면 NULL 반환 */ (SELECT vr3.candidate_id FROM vote_record vr3 WHERE vr3.vote_id = v.vote_id AND vr3.member_id = #{memberId} FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS myVotedCandidateId, /* ★ 이 후보에 투표한 멤버 닉네임 목록 (쉼표 구분) */ (SELECT LISTAGG(m2.nickname, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY vr4.record_id) FROM vote_record vr4 JOIN member2 m2 ON m2.member_id = vr4.member_id WHERE vr4.candidate_id = vc.candidate_id) AS voterNames FROM vote v JOIN vote_candidate vc ON vc.vote_id = v.vote_id WHERE v.trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY v.vote_id DESC, vc.candidate_id ASC
